description: Composition Black shirt with white stripes, made of 100% superfine cotton, has a tipped collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, SPI 16 on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest, box pleat at the back and a tailed hem Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Line dry inside out in shade Warm steam iron do not iron on decorations Created from soft cotton fabric and fine cuts to offer a flattering formal silhouette, this black and white striped shirt from arrow makes for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formal pants and a blazer. Add on leather shoes and classy accessories for that perfect formal look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'11" Shoulders: 17.5"
